response: The supervisor in a primary care clinic setting needs to praise a Medical Technician for a letter of appreciation that was provided from an external stakeholder. The letter of appreciation included: "Between August 2023 and 21 October 2023, [Name] volunteered in the committee organizing the Tri-Mess Battle of the Bands event. Their hard work, experience, and enthusiasm were essential in the committee’s efforts in planning and running the event – which both supported the morale and welfare of the members of [Organization] as well as promoted a positive relationship in the community by accepting donations to the [Food Bank Name]. Their expertise and services as PMC for the Junior Ranks Mess were an essential function to the success of the event."
